Invoice Draft62

Billable work units grouped by project, with rates and flags for role mismatches or missing contract rates. Review before sending to client.

rate_fallbackNo contract rate found — timesheet rate used. Verify before sending.
role_mismatchUser not listed in the SOW team roster. Needs approval before billing.
name_ambiguousFirst name shared by multiple users — confirm correct person is being billed.
name_variantBare first name may be a variant of another user — risk of double-billing or misattribution.
⚠ sagar.sahasrabuddhe: first name 'sagar' shared with ['sagar.yadav'] — confirm correct person is being billed.
⚠ gaurav.shewale: first name 'gaurav' shared with ['gaurav'] — confirm correct person is being billed.
⚠ gaurav: bare first name — may be same person as ['gaurav.shewale']. Verify before billing.
⚠ sagar.yadav: first name 'sagar' shared with ['sagar.sahasrabuddhe'] — confirm correct person is being billed.

sidharth2026-03-07AI WorkshopsEntry falls on a Saturday or SundayWU-WU-114

AI Summary

Structured intelligence panel and natural-language summaries from each agent in the audit pipeline — leakage, compliance, invoice, reconciliation.

Executive Digest
AI
AI-generated synthesis
⚠️ Revenue at Risk
Identified $301,058 in missed/incorrect billing driven by rate mismatches, unlogged work, and contract overage
  • Pranav overbilled $75 vs $55/hr SOW rate on Entain; $5K–$10K recovery opportunity
  • 91 unlogged Slack work signals (code reviews, deployments) = ~$3K–$7K uncaptured
  • 42 contract cap overages beyond SOW monthly limits; clarification pending
🚫 Compliance Blockers
338 CRITICAL violations halt invoicing: 204 leave-day entries, 128 unassigned staff, 4 deactivated employees
  • 204 hours logged on approved leave days violates HR policy; must remove before client submission
  • 128 hours billed by staff not assigned to projects per contract team roster; clients will reject
  • 287 role mismatches across work units—contract authorization missing for many billing lines
🧾 Invoice Status
$442,592.25 draft (6,259 hrs) ready for review; 53 line items flagged; invoice NOT sendable
  • 47 rate_fallback warnings: no SOW rates; using timesheet rates requires client approval
  • 19.5% of hours non-billable (1,519 hrs untagged/archived); quality flags on 79.9% of entries
Priority Actions
1Correct pranav's Entain CRM rate $75→$55/hr backfill March 1–31 (Finance) — $5K–$10K recovery
2Remove 204 leave-day billing entries or obtain retroactive HR+client approval before invoicing
3Reconcile 128 unassigned project entries: verify contract roster or delete hours (PM + Finance)
4Audit deepak + satyam timesheets: 1,411 hours_mismatch flags indicate data entry errors; freeze billing until resolved
5Extract SOW contract rates for AI Workshops, Economist, Entain; replace 47 timesheet rate fallbacks with approved rates
